# Phase 2 Validation Benchmark Results

Repository: **nestjs-real** (RealWorld Example App)

## Performance Matrix

| Mode | Accuracy |
| ---- | -------- |
| Raw Only | 100% |
| Human Map | 90% |
| Human + Raw | 100% |
| Generated Map | 100% |
| Generated + Raw | 100% |

## Human Map Fidelity

Conceptually: `Generated + Raw / Human + Raw` = **100.0%**

## Coverage Gap Analysis (Failures in Generated + Raw)

🎉 **Zero failures! Generated + Raw achieved 100% accuracy.**

## Conclusion Signal

**STRONG SIGNAL (Success)** - The automatically generated map preserves the reasoning lift of the human map.
